title: Skull and Bones
description: Discover my Minecraft Java Texture Pack 'Skull and Bones' and immerse yourself in a mysterious atmosphere!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ed33de181e642c2d61e1b08760ff6e2cf4b8b8.png) **SKULL AND BONES☠️**
Discover the "Skull and Bones" Texture Pack for Minecraft Java and immerse yourself in a dark, mysterious atmosphere! @znygames ### 🗒|DESCRIPTION This unique pack transforms your game's graphics with a captivating skull and bones theme. The Skull and Bones Texture Pack features redesigned elements including the start screen, hotbar, and much more. All modifications in the GUI folder have been crafted to enhance your Minecraft experience with a dark and exciting touch. New! with this pack: - start screen - options - buttons - gui - hotbar  ### 🎞|TRAILER ### 💬|SOCIAL (っ＾▿＾)۶🍸🌟🍺٩(˘◡˘ ) **DISCORD** [▶️ visit me!](https://discord.gg/g6vpenZ4x8) Hey, We invite you to join our Discord community where you can connect with fellow players, share your ideas, and report any bugs you encounter. Whether you have suggestions for improving the hotbar or need support with any issues, our community is here to help. Let’s build, explore, and create together! ### 🖼|EXAMPLE **HOTBAR** **GUI** **START SCREEN** **more examples in the picture gallery above ⬆️** ### 🛈 |INSTALL Note: If you encounter any issues, make sure that the texture pack is compatible with your version of Minecraft, and that you have followed all of the steps correctly.
VANILLA - Open Minecraft: Launch Minecraft and click on the "Options" button. - Go to the "Resource Packs" section: In the options menu, select "Resource Packs" to open the resource packs screen. - Move the texture pack to the correct location: Locate the folder where your Minecraft resource packs are stored. The default location is usually in the "resourcepacks" folder under your Minecraft game directory. Move the downloaded .zip file to this folder. - Select the texture pack in Minecraft: Back in the resource packs screen, select the texture pack that you just moved to the resource packs folder. The texture pack should now be listed in the "Selected Resource Packs" section. - Apply the changes: Click on the "Done" button to apply the changes and enable the texture pack. - Enjoy the new texture pack: Start a new game or load a saved game, and the new texture pack should now be in effect.
### 🔗|BEDROCK VERSION ### 💖| THX! See you in the next pack!
